message:
feat(routing,sync): propagate auto-import to all routing callsites and fix path normalization

Wire auto_import_storage_ctx_if_stale into every storage-open callsite
across close, comments, delete, dep, graph, label, lint, orphans, reopen,
show, and update commands so external-routed operations always trigger
import. Refactor orphans to use the shared helper instead of inline logic.

In sync/path.rs, introduce normalize_path_lexically to resolve .. components
lexically before validation, allowing legitimate in-tree paths like
subdir/../.beads/issues.jsonl while still rejecting true traversal attempts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         Commands::Query { command } => commands::query::execute(&command, &overrides, &output_ctx),
         Commands::Graph(args) => storage_result.as_ref().map_or_else(
             || commands::graph::execute(&args, &overrides, &output_ctx),
-            |res| commands::graph::execute_with_storage_ctx(&args, &overrides, &output_ctx, res),
+            |res| {
+                commands::graph::execute_with_storage_ctx(
+                    &args,
+                    &overrides,
+                    &output_ctx,
+                    ctx.beads_dir
+                        .as_deref()
+                        .expect("preopened graph storage should have a beads dir"),
+                    res,

+            },
         ),
         Commands::Agents(args) => {
